subparts.text: Explain microanimations and microinteractions in DCX management with the help of an example.
Explain the three stages of search engine search process.
What is a dynamically rendered webpage? Give an example
What is keyword density and keyword stuffing? Discuss an alternative to avoid keyword stuffing.
Explain the difference between paid, owned, and earned media. How can each be leveraged for maximum brand visibility? Give examples
What is Digital Customer Experience Management? Discuss some principles associated with it.
Analyse how e-CRM data can lead to more personalised marketing strategies. Suggest atleast five use cases.
What are the three stages in a search analytics process? Discuss some of the measured to be taken for “on page optimization”
What is Google Search Console and how is it different from Google Analytics? List 5 benefits of using Google Search Console
Discuss sentiment analysis, topics and trend mining, intention mining, & concept mining with examples.
